item.title: 広告まみれでちゃんと読めないサイトとか、見知らぬ他人が喧嘩するように設計されたSNSとか、デマとAIまみれの動画サイトと…
item.author: クワハリ (@kuwahali.bsky.social)
item.description:
広告まみれでちゃんと読めないサイトとか、見知らぬ他人が喧嘩するように設計されたSNSとか、デマとAIまみれの動画サイトとかほんとになんなんだよ。全く慣れてなくてずっと新鮮にムカついてる
あの時代は本当に狂ってたなって後世言われるようになることを願うことしかできない
item.content:encoded:
広告まみれでちゃんと読めないサイトとか、見知らぬ他人が喧嘩するように設計されたSNSとか、デマとAIまみれの動画サイトとかほんとになんなんだよ。全く慣れてなくてずっと新鮮にムカついてる
あの時代は本当に狂ってたなって後世言われるようになることを願うことしかできない

item.title: ‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ ‎ ‎早朝で腹も減り ‎コンビニで買った握り飯を… ‎ ‎『お父さん、待って！』 ‎ ‎『…
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ
‎
‎早朝で腹も減り
‎コンビニで買った握り飯を…
‎
‎『お父さん、待って！』
‎
‎『魚がお腹いっぱいになる』
‎
‎『釣れるまで辛抱して』
‎
‎『これ釣り師の心得だよ』
‎
‎「へぇ〜」と返事したが…
‎
‎お嬢さん…
‎８年お供してますがね…
‎初耳ですぞ！
‎
‎てか…
‎好きな明太握りが売切れで…
‎ワシを恨んでますね😂
‎
‎しばらくすると…
‎
‎『お父さん、おにぎり食べよう』
‎
‎「えっ…釣り師の心得は？」
‎
‎『今日は釣れなそうだから』
‎
‎へぇ〜空腹だよね？お嬢さん…🤣
‎
‎
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ
‎
‎早朝で腹も減り
‎コンビニで買った握り飯を…
‎
‎『お父さん、待って！』
‎
‎『魚がお腹いっぱいになる』
‎
‎『釣れるまで辛抱して』
‎
‎『これ釣り師の心得だよ』
‎
‎「へぇ〜」と返事したが…
‎
‎お嬢さん…
‎８年お供してますがね…
‎初耳ですぞ！
‎
‎てか…
‎好きな明太握りが売切れで…
‎ワシを恨んでますね😂
‎
‎しばらくすると…
‎
‎『お父さん、おにぎり食べよう』
‎
‎「えっ…釣り師の心得は？」
‎
‎『今日は釣れなそうだから』
‎
‎へぇ〜空腹だよね？お嬢さん…🤣
‎
‎
‎
‎

item.title: Spain is set to clash against defending champion Argentina a…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Spain is set to clash against defending champion Argentina at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey to cap an epic World Cup. Plus, we'll see the first-ever halftime show for a final, with performances by Madonna, Shakira, Justin Bieber and BTS. Follow live updates. https://cnn.it/4fnom2h
item.content:encoded: Spain is set to clash against defending champion Argentina at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey to cap an epic World Cup. Plus, we'll see the first-ever halftime show for a final, with performances by Madonna, Shakira, Justin Bieber and BTS. Follow live updates. https://cnn.it/4fnom2h

item.title: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked so…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans?
item.content:encoded: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans?

item.title: イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754…
item.author: バーナム博物館長 (@barnummuseum.bsky.social)
item.description:
イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754～68年にジョン・ウッドの設計で建てられました。建物はルネサンス風ジョージアン様式で建てられており、優雅な円型を描く建物の列が印象的です。この建物はBBCの某番組で英国最高の建物の一つに選ばれました。
#アート #近代建築
item.content:encoded:
イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754～68年にジョン・ウッドの設計で建てられました。建物はルネサンス風ジョージアン様式で建てられており、優雅な円型を描く建物の列が印象的です。この建物はBBCの某番組で英国最高の建物の一つに選ばれました。
#アート #近代建築

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called Wh…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called White Creek, and it looks awesome! The game is a third person shooter that mirrors the vibe of PS1 horror games, it's a total throwback that looks like a ton of fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called White Creek, and it looks awesome! The game is a third person shooter that mirrors the vibe of PS1 horror games, it's a total throwback that looks like a ton of fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 7月19日 日曜日☁☀️ 室温33.2℃ １勤目終了なり。。。 暑い🫠 外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠 エアコン取り…
item.author: 菊理（くくり） (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月19日 日曜日☁☀️
室温33.2℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
暑い🫠
外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠
エアコン取り付け業者とこちらの休みの都合が合わない…
いったいいつになったら新しいエアコン取り付けてくれるんだろう…🫠
しんどいぞ…🥵

今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🥤
明日も頑張ろう…🫠
item.content:encoded:
7月19日 日曜日☁☀️
室温33.2℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
暑い🫠
外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠
エアコン取り付け業者とこちらの休みの都合が合わない…
いったいいつになったら新しいエアコン取り付けてくれるんだろう…🫠
しんどいぞ…🥵

今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🥤
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

item.title: In its rush to meet White House demands for deportations, fe…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: In its rush to meet White House demands for deportations, federal law enforcement has engaged in extensive misconduct, resulting in hundreds of lost or abandoned criminal cases against protesters and immigrants, a New York Times investigation found.
item.content:encoded: In its rush to meet White House demands for deportations, federal law enforcement has engaged in extensive misconduct, resulting in hundreds of lost or abandoned criminal cases against protesters and immigrants, a New York Times investigation found.

item.title: Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife S…
item.author: Paul van der Meer (@paulvandermeer.bsky.social)
item.description:
Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium the White House confirmed.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino said he and Tr*mp will deliver the FIFA World Cup trophy to the winning team's captain on the field.

METLIFE STADIUM
YOU KNOW WHAT TO DO
item.content:encoded:
Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium the White House confirmed.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino said he and Tr*mp will deliver the FIFA World Cup trophy to the winning team's captain on the field.

METLIFE STADIUM
YOU KNOW WHAT TO DO

item.author: チムニー (@chimney1022.bsky.social)

item.title: “In these incredibly divisive political times, we’re actuall…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
“In these incredibly divisive political times, we’re actually seeing the rare issue that unites Americans: opposition to government surveillance.

And I don’t think it’s going anywhere. I think this movement is only going to grow.”
item.content:encoded:
“In these incredibly divisive political times, we’re actually seeing the rare issue that unites Americans: opposition to government surveillance.

And I don’t think it’s going anywhere. I think this movement is only going to grow.”

item.title: A bit of good news to start the day. Football isn’t coming…
item.author: Alistair Coleman (@alistaircoleman.bsky.social)
item.description:
A bit of good news to start the day.

Football isn’t coming home, but the Tates are 😆
item.content:encoded:
A bit of good news to start the day.

Football isn’t coming home, but the Tates are 😆

item.title: Absolutely delighted to see this Small Tortoiseshell Butterf…
item.author: Carl Bovis (@carlbovisnature.bsky.social)
item.description:
Absolutely delighted to see this Small Tortoiseshell Butterfly on my Buddleia this week! 😍
This is the first I've seen this year... a few years ago they were by far the most common butterfly I'd see, but I rarely see them nowadays. 😔How about you?🦋

My bird goodies shop;
www.carlbovis.com/shop-3 🐦
item.content:encoded:
Absolutely delighted to see this Small Tortoiseshell Butterfly on my Buddleia this week! 😍
This is the first I've seen this year... a few years ago they were by far the most common butterfly I'd see, but I rarely see them nowadays. 😔How about you?🦋

My bird goodies shop;
www.carlbovis.com/shop-3 🐦

item.title: A raccoon with a rare spinal condition in Seattle has gone v…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A raccoon with a rare spinal condition in Seattle has gone viral after being named "Jimothy" by a woman who spotted him.
item.content:encoded: A raccoon with a rare spinal condition in Seattle has gone viral after being named "Jimothy" by a woman who spotted him.

item.content:encoded: Sunday.

item.title: A lawyer in the Texas comptroller’s office said he believed …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
A lawyer in the Texas comptroller’s office said he believed allegations against Islamic private schools made by Sam Westrop — who once had to pay damages for making false claims — appeared credible.

When asked, he said he never Googled Westrop.

with @texastribune.org
item.content:encoded:
A lawyer in the Texas comptroller’s office said he believed allegations against Islamic private schools made by Sam Westrop — who once had to pay damages for making false claims — appeared credible.

When asked, he said he never Googled Westrop.

with @texastribune.org

item.title: Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide…
item.author: The Washington Post (@washingtonpost.com)
item.description:
Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide to have received a new type of gene-editing therapy that has functionally cured him of sickle cell disease.

For Cressy, this meant that he could finally pursue his dream of becoming a pilot.
item.content:encoded:
Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide to have received a new type of gene-editing therapy that has functionally cured him of sickle cell disease.

For Cressy, this meant that he could finally pursue his dream of becoming a pilot.

item.content:encoded: My son is the Under 10 UK Champion for foil fencing. I am bursting with pride

item.title: When Argentina won their semi-final, their players helf up a…
item.author: Marcus Chown (@marcuschown.bsky.social)
item.description:
When Argentina won their semi-final, their players helf up a banner saying the Falklands/Malvinas belong to Argentina.

If Spain win the final - which I really hope they do - it would be great if they would hold up a banner saying…

RELEASE THE EPSTEIN FILES!
item.content:encoded:
When Argentina won their semi-final, their players helf up a banner saying the Falklands/Malvinas belong to Argentina.

If Spain win the final - which I really hope they do - it would be great if they would hold up a banner saying…

RELEASE THE EPSTEIN FILES!

item.title: A group that advocates for private school funding programs e…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
A group that advocates for private school funding programs estimated that last year, states allocated $10.6B to these programs, up 29%.

One company encouraged churches to tap into public funds, calling them "God's new gold mine."
item.content:encoded:
A group that advocates for private school funding programs estimated that last year, states allocated $10.6B to these programs, up 29%.

One company encouraged churches to tap into public funds, calling them "God's new gold mine."
